Icons Week is coming 10th-14th August ArtsEd ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

Join the amazing team at Perform Now and the incredible Diantè Lodge, Kerry Ellis, Ben Forster, Hannah Dimtsu, Jacosta Almgil, Ben Harris and Hannah Taylor for an iconic week of fun, intense and high standard training/workshops led by the best in the biz. 

From the West End to Broadway our iconic lineup have done it all!! 

BOOK NOW!!! 

https://performnow.co.uk/icons-summer-week

See you there!
#performnow #icons #youngperformers #londonmums #performanceopportunities

items.text:
**We are still seeking actors ages 18 and up! Auditions are due Tuesday!**

**Project: **Cryptophasia

**Type: **Theatre

***Audition Information***

Initial auditions will be video submissions **due** **Tuesday, June 9th**. Video should consist of a 60-90 second contemporary monologue and a slate with your name, height, current location, title of your piece, and whether you are available for callbacks on June 16th.

**Callbacks, by invitation, will be held from 6-8 PM on Tuesday, June 16th** in the Forum Theatre at Koelbel Library (5955 S Holly St, Centennial). Actors unavailable for callbacks are still encouraged to submit, and alternate arrangements will be made if needed.

**Submit Your Audition Here**: [[https://forms.gle/j4YqReoa7yp3uZ6m8](https://forms.gle/j4YqReoa7yp3uZ6m8?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExR1JUdnFtNFFlQ1BEcTdXM3NydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5Irm-Jb1muA3Zx8JLaYkrg3vzH2RacBbXQhxl-t0_UEG-PDA-bZB4jx-YGBQ_aem_OvBCwmeD9pLYDsr2RKqTmg)](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fforms.gle%2Fj4YqReoa7yp3uZ6m8%3Ffbclid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExR1JUdnFtNFFlQ1BEcTdXM3NydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5EuBRnCPWdwQ2herTFHH3ZSgRCNVerpoqS20Atm7kv1_cIR4G8eqV1Msn22Q_aem_BOhUsw5S9vorqF6DZ5sWjA&h=AUDZr-FaMO1Cy-qmuCVf8Z3eOmd_L0d7nWR_38zi_0571mVfip6dGhM0CqSDaVBFN8ITlvVj50M1nrqfieWmQZF2TG0ka9xvQqbhU6aTfJkwsmrQbVNR_6RbimctXlTHFBcN&__tn__=-UK*F)

***Dates***

**Rehearsals will be held June 25th through July 18th** on select weekdays and Saturdays. **A tentative rehearsal schedule can be viewed *****HERE*****;** please note that final schedule will be adjusted based around actor availability, and not all actors will be called to all rehearsals.

Rehearsals will primarily be located at Koelbel Library (5955 S Holly St, Centennial)

**Tech rehearsals:** July 20th-22nd at the Three Leaches Theatre (1560 Teller Street, Lakewood).

**Performances:** July 23rd, 24th, and 25th at 7 PM; July 26th at 2 PM, at the Three Leaches Theatre (1560 Teller Street, Lakewood).

***Compensation***

Actors will be paid a portion of profits, dependant on production netting a profit.

*Please note that this is not a project intended to make a profit for the organization or the producers, rather to bring together a group of enthusiastic creatives who want to collaborate on bringing to life an original work and creating a meaningful piece of theatre.*

***Show Synopsis***

**Cryptophasia (N)-** The phenomenon of an autonomous language developed by twins that only the two children can understand.

​

Anna and Bella Lavey, soul mates and identical twins joined at the hip, have grown up believing that they cannot live without each other. But when Anna develops a fatal heart condition, the girls are confronted with the true cost of freedom--if such a thing even exists at all. At its core, this play explores the universality of having an identity thrust upon us, one which both binds and defines us.

***Character Breakdown***

*The roles of Anna and Bella Lavey have been pre-cast.*

*Stagebugz Theatre is committed to a policy of equal employment opportunity and does not discriminate in casting practices on the basis of race, color, religion, sex, gender identity, sexual orientation, national origin, age, disability, or any other legally protected status. We actively encourage adult performers of all backgrounds, identities, and abilities to audition.*

**Mom** (*Female-identifying, 40s*)- Anna and Bella's mother. A master in pretending everything's okay; she's doing her best to give her daughters what is, in her opinion, a "normal" life.

**Favorite** (*Female-identifying, 60s-70s*)- Anna and Bella's wise, insightful grandmother. The kind of person everybody counts on to make everything better.

**Missy **(*Female-identifying or non-binary, 18+ to play ages 11 and 18*)- Anna and Bella's cousin who always speaks her mind.

**Unk/Dr. Truman** (Male*-identifying, 30s-50s*)- Actor will double as Missy's father and Anna and Bella's lifelong pediatrician.

***Production Team***

Director- Courtney Velarde

Stage Manager/Assistant Director- Mary Sullivan

Playwright- Aspen Somers

Producer- Ashley Somers

***About Us***

Stagebugz Theatre was founded by Aspen and Ashley Somers in 2021 as a 501(c)3 with the mission of creating uplifting, accessible theatre education for children. Cryptophasia is our first community-based production under our brand-new “Theatre in Flight” program, with the mission to offer a place for underrepresented theatre professionals to share their voices and develop their own projects.

For questions or to learn more, visit [www.stagebugztheatre.com](https://www.facebook.com/api/graphql/www.stagebugztheatre.com?__tn__=-UK*F) or contact stagebugztheatre@gmail.com.
items.previewDescription: Stagebugz Theatre is a 501(c)3 youth theater company dedicated to providing accessible theatre education where every performer is valued and uplifted. We offer affordable acting and musical theatre classes, productions, and summer camps, free workshops, and family-friendly performances!
items.title: Youth Theater | Stagebugz Theatre | Littleton

items.text:
**Now Staffing: **Elite Event Pros is looking to hire males for an upcoming medical conference in **Aurora**!

**Event Details: ASE 2026**
*Gaylord Rockies Resort & Convention Center*
* June 26: 11:30am-6pm
* June 27: 9am-5:30pm
* June 28: 8:30am-2pm

**Rate: **$225/day with up to $30/day reimbursed for parking or rideshare

**Role Description:** Ultrasound model - client will be scanning the chest, abdomen, arms and legs. Because there are chest scans, our client has requested males.

**Dress Code:** gym attire

**To Apply:** Please email a recent picture to Staffing@EliteEventPros.com

Make sure include ASE in the subject.

Thank you!

topComments.text: I did this years ago. They were not so gentle in the abdomen area. Good experience though

🎬 12 SPOTS. ONE COACH. REAL SETS. AUGUST 2026 — OHIO.

Andy McPhee (170+ credits — mentees include Sydney Sweeney & Kodi Smit-McPhee) is running a 10½-day Acting Intensive Workshop, August 3–13 in Burton, Ohio.

✈️ TRAVELLING FROM INTERSTATE OR INTERNATIONALLY? The Traveler Package ($6,175) covers your private room at Punderson Manor Lodge, 3 daily meals, Cleveland airport transfer, and a professional demo reel. You just book the flight — we handle everything else.

📍 CLEVELAND / OHIO LOCAL? Jump in on the Commuter Package ($3,500) — same elite training, real film sets, casting directors, and demo reel.

All levels welcome · Ages 18+ · Refunds until July 2

Comment below or DM for details 👇

items.text:
# CASTING CALL: "CASTAWAY" (Short Film)

**Project Type:** Short Film (LGBTQIA+ / Latinx Drama)

**Union Status:** Non-Union / Union

**Rate:** $250/Day (Estimated 3 days of filming)
**Language: **Spanish/English

**Location:** Chicago, IL

**Submission Deadline:** July 25, 2026
## ABOUT THE PROJECT

*Castaway* follows the story of Victor, a conservative man who makes the heartbreaking decision to cast out his teenage son, Jaime, due to his own traditional values and beliefs. When Victor begins to quietly question the beliefs that once defined him, he is pulled into a private reckoning. His marriage begins to crumble under the weight of his growing guilt and humanity.

## ROLES AVAILABLE
[SOFIA] — Main Talent
* **Ethnicity:** Latinx/ Latin America
* **Age Range:** 40–55 years old
* **Character Bio:** Sofia is the respected president of her parish council and carries herself with elegance, confidence, and authority. She is deeply devoted to her faith and community, often appearing composed and in control. Years ago, Sofia made a decision that fractured her relationship with her son. Her dedication to representing her faith and community has become both a source of strength and a shield against painful truths.
## KEY DATES & AUDITION INFO
* **Filming Timeline:** EST. 3 days total (Dates TBD and will be in either August, September, or October)
* **Audition Process:** Virtual callbacks for principal roles will be held via Google Meet.
## HOW TO APPLY

Please submit your headshot, resume, and reel via our Backstage submission link below:

[https://www.backstage.com/casting/castaway-3173616/](https://www.backstage.com/casting/castaway-3173616/)

*Local Chicago & Midwest talent is highly preferred.*

The Dinner Detective is currently casting!

All roles paid and scheduling happens one month at a time based on your availability!

To be considered for the virtual audition, you must email your pic and resume to dinnerdetectiveauditions@gmail.com with your audition city in the subject line. If selected, you will then receive a character breakdown, show pay details and an audition form to fill out and send back.

items.text:
Need to record my first ever self tape soon, I’m really nervous, apart from stuff like lighting and how to film them I’m a little lost! 

How do you know if the one you send is ‘the one’?
What if I take multiple but I am unsure what one to send? 
Does it matter if I don’t get all the script correct and just go with flows as long as it’s close to the original? 

Any advice would be really appreciated 🩷

(I don’t have a agent/ agency/ management to help)

topComments.text: Hiya first of all a neutral backdrop nothing  in the background pictures etc do then your I dent (the bit about yourself)  name, location and who your represented by,then turn to the left -right- back and back to the front i tend to do this seperate then stitch it to the scene in case you have to do a retake you dont have to do everything all again make surecyou try and stick to the dialogue you are given as the people casting you want to see how you deal with the scene,if its a two hander (two people)get someone to read the other person's dialogue but out of shot,as this is about you and your time to shine,unless stated that they remain in the frame,try and give a few variations of the scene ie a different emotion ....hope this helps you and the very best of luck !!! 🙏

Same as Jayne. 

But I would add...... Do it like you don't really care..... Like it's nothing.  
I don't mean slapdash or just rubbish. Just as though it's not really a big deal (because the truth is it's not really a big deal! 😊) 

Just do what you do. Don't over think it. 
Do ident in portrait. Do exactly what they want...plus a little bit more if you can. Answer the questions they ask. And do the correct lines. If a lot and short deadline read them. 
If u have nobody to do the other lines - use your imagination as if the person is actually there. 

Oh and to reiterate Jayne - they will know what they want and if you fit what that is then they pick you. 
That's it. 

Easy. 

Good luck.

(I don’t have a agent/ agency/ management to help)
items.title: Need to record my first ever self tape soon, I’m really nervous, apart from stuff like lighting and how to film them I’m a little lost!

items.text:
I'm a little bit cross...
Both the last LOL Factory Weekender and this one have been filled mainly by NON-ACTORS. 😂
Which confuses me.
Because if you're an actor, what is the ONE thing that stands out most on a CV?
The thing that gets talked about when you're not in the room?
The thing that instantly says confidence, bravery, timing, quick thinking and presence?
Stand-up comedy.
Yet members of the public seem more willing to throw themselves into something terrifying than some actors do. 👀
That's worrying.
Actors are supposed to be the people who run towards discomfort, not away from it.
And before anyone says, "I wouldn't know where to start..."
You'll be taught by award-winning comedian Jed Salisbury – a two-time Best MC winner at the Yorkshire Comedy Awards and part of the team behind Dave's Spirit of the Fringe Award-winning Best in Class.
The good news?
There are still places available.
So if you've been sitting there thinking, "I'd love to do that, but..."
This is your sign to stop the sentence there.
See you on the 27th. 🎤🔥
https://buy.stripe.com/14A28r5bs5pZ5aw0oi4gg0y
#ActorsLife�#StandUpComedy�#CastingDirectors�#ActingCareer�#ComfortZone

pageName.name: Teatr Propozycji Dialog im. Henryki Rodkiewicz

user.name: Teatr Propozycji Dialog im. Henryki Rodkiewicz

sharedPost.text:
Przed nami święto teatrów jednego aktora !
Najciekawsze monodramy z całego kraju w jednym miejscu !

Zarząd Stowarzyszenia Teatr Propozycji „Dialog” w Koszalinie ogłasza, że do 15 czerwca 2026 roku przyjmowane będą zgłoszenia do turnieju 14. FESTIWALU DEBIUTÓW W MONODRAMIE „Strzała Północy 2026”.
Do udziału w turnieju organizator zaprasza twórców teatru jednego aktora, którzy zadebiutowali w monodramie w czterech kategoriach: debiutu aktorskiego, reżyserskiego, dramaturgicznego i (lub) choreograficznego. Turniej ma formę otwartą i mogą w nim rywalizować jednoosobowe przedstawienia zgłoszone przez instytucje kultury, stowarzyszenia, niezależne grupy artystów, a także monodramy zgłoszone przez indywidualnych twórców. Mogą brać w nim udział monodramy teatrów dramatycznych, tańca, radia i telewizji. Zapraszamy debiutanckie monodramy bez względu na datę ich premiery.
 Regulamin turnieju i link do Karty Zgłoszenia: www.TeatrDialog/monodramy

Organizatorem Festiwalu Debiutów w Monodramie  jest Stowarzyszenie Teatr Propozycji "Dialog" im. Henryki Rodkiewicz w Koszalinie we współpracy z Urzędem Miejskim, Ministerstwem Kultury i Dziedzictwa Narodowego, Bałtyckim Teatrem Dramatycznym im. Juliusza Słowackiego, Centrum Kultury 105 i Polskim Radiem Koszalin.
Festiwal odbędzie się w dniach 8-11 października 2026 roku. Festiwal ma formę prezentacji. Jego zasady zawarte są w regulaminie ustanowionym przez powołaną przez organizatora radę artystyczną.

#TeatrDialog #Koszalin #MKiDN #FestiwalDebiutówwMonodramie @obserwujący

Jacek Frączek (miedzy 38 a 50 lat), pacjent Tomasza.

Wygląd/charakter: wrażliwy, emocjonalny, mściwy mężczyzna. Podejmuje terapię u Tomasza tylko z chęci zemsty: obwinia terapeutę za to, że żona od niego odeszła i zabrała dziecko.Postać z wyglądu nie może od razu wzbudzać podejrzeń, być w oczywisty sposób podejrzany. 

Terminy i stawka: 15 i 17.06, stawka 800zł netto za całość

sharedPost.text:
Ich bin glücklich!

Glücklich über jeden Tag an dem es mir soweit gut geht, glücklich das meine Leidenschaft mein Beruf sein kann, glücklich das ich sein darf was ich bin - ein Mensch! 

Und wenn ich das Mikrofon in die Hand nehme, auf Play drücke und meine Energie, meine Interpretation von Kunst an die Menschen weitergebe die es wertschätzen, dann ist diese kleine Welt in Ordnung.

Ich habe mal die Kamera mitlaufen lassen und euch ein kleines Medley zusammengestellt. 🎶

Worin findet ihr euer tägliches Glück?

Schreibt es in die Kommentare ☀️
.
.
.
#probe #mathiasmariekaiser #glück #livegesang #medley

items.text:
🎬 **Casting Call Alert!**

We’re looking for talented performers for **MAMA**, a fantasy drama student short film exploring grief, healing, and the connection between the physical and spiritual worlds.

🎞 **Production Name:** *MAMA*
📍 **Location:** Berlin
🎓 **Produced as part of the Master’s program at MetFilm School Berlin**
🎥 **Shooting Dates:** July 14–20 (3 shooting days + rehearsals)
💰 **Low-budget student production**

🎭 **Roles:**
* INTIMBA - Female, 40s–50s
* TSIKO - Female, 20s–30s
* JINYA - Male, 30s–40s

🌍 This project is inspired by East African folklore, African masks, and the cultural traditions that shape the film’s spiritual world.

We particularly encourage submissions from performers of African heritage. East African heritage is a strong plus, though not required. Movement and/or dance experience is also a plus.

📩 **If you're interested, please send your headshot, CV, and/or demo reel to:**
**abril.arap.film@gmail.com**

Help us bring this visually rich and emotionally resonant story to life.

We can’t wait to see your submissions! 🌙✨

items.text:
Hallo zusammen! :)
Ich komme aus Marokko und lebe jetzt in Deutschland. Ich würde super gerne wieder anfangen, Musik zu machen. Das Video hier ist zwar schon etwas älter, aber es zeigt, wo ich herkomme.

Ich bin aktuell auf der Suche nach Leuten in München, die Lust haben, gemeinsam an neuen Projekten zu arbeiten oder mir Tipps geben können, wie ich hier am besten starte. Mir fehlen momentan noch die passenden Kontakte.

Falls jemand Interesse hat oder jemanden kennt, meldet euch gerne bei mir! Ich freue mich auf neue Bekanntschaften und gemeinsame Musik

items.groupTitle: Film- und Musikschaffende, Schauspieler, Musiker, Darsteller, Sänger, Model
items.summary:
Hallo zusammen! :)
Ich komme aus Marokko und lebe jetzt in Deutschland. Ich würde super gerne wieder anfangen, Musik zu machen. Das Video hier ist zwar schon etwas älter, aber es zeigt, wo ich herkomme.

Ich bin aktuell auf der Suche nach Leuten in München, die Lust haben, gemeinsam an neuen Projekten zu arbeiten oder mir Tipps geben können, wie ich hier am besten starte. Mir fehlen momentan noch die passenden Kontakte.

Falls jemand Interesse hat oder jemanden kennt, meldet euch gerne bei mir! Ich freue mich auf neue Bekanntschaften und gemeinsame Musik
items.title: Hallo zusammen! :)

items.text:
Das neue Streaming Bundle für Unter uns Fans #unteruns #hbomax #rtl+ #rtlplus 

https://youtube.com/shorts/sRtW50ssRrA 

Mein Moment im Büroloft von „Unter uns“

Diese Woche durfte ich bei „Unter uns“ in den @mmcstudios Köln als Nebenrollendarsteller mit Text vor der Kamera stehen. Die Szene spielte im Büroloft zwischen Huber & Huber Bauvision und Goldberg Superior Cologne. Mehr darf ich nicht verraten.

@actpm Patrick Müller als Tobias Lassner

Patrick verkörpert seit 2006 Tobias Lassner, einen erfolgreichen Anwalt mit kühler Fassade und weichem Kern. Seine Verbindung zu Leo macht diese Figur besonders menschlich und erzählerisch stark im Ensemble.

@miriam_lahnstein Miriam Lahnstein als Patrizia Neumann-Goldberg

Miriam spielt Patrizia Neumann-Goldberg, eine selbstbewusste Unternehmerin mit Machtinstinkt, Charme und Konsequenz. Als Mutter von Stella verkörpert sie Kontrolle, Ehrgeiz und familiäre Spannung mit großer Präsenz vor der Kamera.

@harun.yildirim_official Harun Yildirim als Ferhat Gülek

Harun spielt Ferhat Gülek, Architekt, Vater von Baris und Esma sowie Noch-Ehemann von Dana. Seine Figur bringt Charme, Lebensfreude und emotionale Bewegung in die Serie und in die Schillerallee hinein.

Wertschätzung am Set

Besonders wertvoll war das ruhige, respektvolle Miteinander der UFA-Produktion. In den MMC Studios Köln spürt man Präzision, Vertrauen, Timing und Teamgeist hinter jeder Szene und jedem gemeinsamen Moment am Set.

Jetzt ansehen und dranbleiben

Wenn Ihr „Unter uns“ verfolgt, achtet gern auf diese Figuren. Die Serie läuft jeden Abend bei @rtl_de und ist auf @rtlplus streambar. Teil 2 findet Ihr im Kanal von @sandras.social.media.creation (Sandra Wötzel) zum Weiterlesen.

Christian Weiße aka @christian_weisse_digi_content

#UnterUns #RTL #RTLPlus #UFASerialDrama #MMCStudios

items.text:
VANCOUVER CASTING CALL: COURTING YOU

Project Type: BookTok/Teaser Trailer

**Compensation: Demo reel material (plus be a part of something fun!)**

**Ideal for actors looking to build romantic lead footage and on-screen chemistry scenes for their demo reel.**

Union Status: **Non-union performers only, please.**

Director/Casting Director: Brianne Hogan

Contact Information: brianne.hogan@gmail.com

Audition Location: Self-tape

Submission Deadline: **June 21, 2026**

Shooting Date: **July 11, 2026**

Shooting Location: Vancouver (TBD)

Shoot Length: Approximately 2–3 hours maximum. 

**SYNOPSIS**

Based on my upcoming e-book, Courting You, this contemporary romantic comedy follows Riley, a 40-year-old woman rebuilding her life after the end of a long-term relationship. Looking for a fresh start, she joins a local tennis club and unexpectedly falls for Hunter, the club's charming 23-year-old tennis instructor. What begins as an unexpected attraction quickly turns into something deeper as both struggle with the realities of their age gap, outside expectations, and the question of whether their connection is worth the risk.

**IMPORTANT NOTE**

Courting You is an age-gap romance between a woman in her 40s and a man in his 20s. Performers should be comfortable portraying romantic attraction, chemistry, and flirtation within this dynamic.

**SCENE BEING FILMED**

The trailer focuses on Riley and Hunter's first meeting at a tennis club. After Hunter accidentally hits Riley with a tennis ball, he rushes over to check on her. The attraction is immediate—until they realize he's the instructor and she's the student.

Tone: Romantic, playful, flirty, contemporary rom-com with strong chemistry and a touch of tension.

**CHARACTER BREAKDOWN**

RILEY (Lead) | Female | 38–45

Riley is a travel writer—independent, adventurous, and globally savvy. Having spent much of her life charting her own course, she's never followed the traditional path expected of women her age. Recently out of a long-term relationship, she's at a crossroads, questioning who she is and what she wants next.

Witty, quirky, and effortlessly relatable, Riley uses humour to navigate uncertainty. When she meets Hunter, what begins as an unexpected attraction quickly becomes something more, forcing her to reconsider the future she thought she wanted.

Personality: Intelligent, warm, self-aware, dry sense of humour, emotionally guarded but hopeful.

HUNTER (Lead) | Male | 22–27

Hunter is a former elite junior tennis player who walked away from his professional ambitions to pursue a law degree. Freshly graduated, he's caught between the life he's always been told he should want and the freedom he's beginning to crave.

Responsible, level-headed, and naturally caring, Hunter has spent most of his life meeting expectations—particularly those of his parents. Beneath his calm exterior is someone eager to experience adventure, take risks, and discover who he is outside of everyone else's plans for him.

Meeting Riley awakens a side of himself he's never fully explored.

Personality: Confident but grounded, compassionate, dependable, mature beyond his years, quietly charismatic.

Requirements: Must be comfortable and believable playing an experienced tennis player. Strong tennis skills preferred. Height 6'0"+. Must be comfortable appearing shirtless for portions of the shoot.

CHEMISTRY BETWEEN LEADS

Riley and Hunter share an immediate, undeniable connection. Their dynamic is playful, flirtatious, and emotionally authentic, with strong romantic tension.

Casting Note: Chemistry between leads is the most important element of this project. Performers should be able to convey attraction, warmth, humour, and emotional depth with minimal dialogue.

**TO SUBMIT**
** Please send the following to: brianne.hogan@gmail.com**

**• Headshot**
** • Resume (if available)**
** • Recent photo(s)**
** • Brief note outlining any tennis experience**
** • Demo reel (optional)**
** • Optional: a short introduction telling us why you're interested in the role**

**Subject Line: *****Courting You – [Riley / Hunter]***

Calling Original Monologues and Poetry!
HACH is having its first summer fundraiser to get to Nanaimo Fringe!

We’d love to use this opportunity to showcase original work from Vancouver artists in true HACH fashion!

We want to hear what you have to say right now.

Info below❤️✨

POSZUKUJEMY STATYSTÓW DO REKLAMY SKLEPU INTERNETOWEGO

items.text:
🎅 **Father Christmas Casting Call – 2026**
Evoke Entertainment is currently seeking **experienced Father Christmas actors** for a series of festive grotto activations across the UK.

📍 **Locations**

We are casting for the following areas:

* Herts (Near Rickmansworth)

* Cardiff

* Yarnton, Oxfordshire

* Busy Bee, Isle of Wight

🗓️ **Key Dates **

(Dates vary across venues, you do not need to be available for all) 

*Saturday 21 November

*Sunday 22 November 

* Saturday 28 November

* Sunday 29 November

*Friday 4 December

* Saturday 5 December

*Sunday 6 December

* Saturday 12 December

* Sunday 13 December

*Thursday 17 December

*Friday 18 December 

* Saturday 19 December

* Sunday 20 December

* Wednesday 23 December

 ⏰ **General Schedule**

* Grotto operating hours typically **between 8:30am – 6:00pm (maximum shift length)**

* Some **shorter days may apply**, to be confirmed via email

* Primarily weekend work, with additional dates in the final week before Christmas

* Full schedules and shift details will be shared privately per location

💼 **Requirements & Rates**

* **Rate of pay is £35 per hour**

* Actors with **their own beard preferred**

* Suit provided

---

 📩 **How to Apply**

Please email: **[castings@evokeents.com]

**Subject line:** *Father Christmas 2026*

Include:

* Your **preferred location(s)**

* Any relevant experience or details

We will respond with full availability schedules and next steps.

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – COMEDY SHORT FILM (NON-UNION, PAID) 🎬

Our team of industry professionals is coming together to create a fun, high-quality comedy short film, giving actors and performers the opportunity to gain experience and work on set with an experienced creative team.

We are currently seeking extras for multiple scenes filming in Miami and Hollywood, FL.

ROLES NEEDED:

• BEACH CHAIR MAN – Male, any ethnicity, age 30–60. Will appear in comedic beach sequence lying in beach chair next to lead actor.

• BEACH WOMEN – Two women, age range 20s–40s, attractive beachgoer types for comedic visual scene at the beach.

• LATIN RESTAURANT EXTRAS – Men and women, all ethnicities, age range 20s–60s. Patrons, dancers, and background characters for lively Miami Latin restaurant/bar scene.

⸻

Production Details:
📍 Locations: Miami, FL & Hollywood Beach, FL
📅 Shoot Dates: June, Exact dates TBD
💰 Compensation: Paid

⸻

Requirements:
• NON-UNION ONLY
• Must be local or able to self-report
• Comfortable working in lively comedy environment
• Some extras may be featured prominently on camera

⸻

Submission Instructions:
Please send headshot/photo, age, current location, and contact information to:
📩 elaine@elainefilms.com

Subject Line: Extras Submission

Serious and available talent only.

Here's a polished casting call post:
🎬 **CASTING CALL – AUE PRODUCTION COMPANY** 🎬

AUE Production Company is now casting for an exciting new television series produced and directed by **Jana Sullivan**.

Jana Sullivan is the writer and producer of *Another Man's Treasure*, which debuted on Tubi, and the author of several successful book series, including numerous ghostwritten works.

We are currently seeking talented actors for a brand-new gritty television series that is set to debut on Tubi. This powerful and groundbreaking series is ready to change the game! We are located in Cincinnati Ohio

Interested actors should submit:

✅ A short bio

✅ A short monologue

Send submissions to: **[actupentemail@gmail.com](mailto:actupentemail@gmail.com)**

Or inbox us directly on Messenger.

Serious inquiries only. We are looking for dedicated talent ready to bring unforgettable characters to life.

#CastingCall #ActorsWanted #TVSeries #Tubi #AUEProductionCompany #JanaSullivan #Auditions #ActingOpportunity

items.text:
URGENT CASTING CALL & CREW CALL

Hi everyone,
I’m am the co director/ co producer of the upcoming student proof of concept, ‘Canary’.
We are looking for cast and crew for this film. We plan to shoot this film on August 10-August 14 in Sydney, Australia . It would be mostly unpaid, but catering services will be provided along with credit and final cuts of the film. We are open to paying compensation for sound, but cannot adhere to daily rates as this is a student production. If you want to be a part of a female led story and production, nows your time to make this happen!

If interested, please email me 
mp4.allish@gmail.com

SUBMISSIONS CLOSE FRIDAY 5TH JUNE, 2026

items.text:
Hi everyone! My name is Chloe, and I’m actively looking for opportunities to work as a Film Production Assistant in film, television, commercials, or other media productions.

I’m a 2024 high school graduate with a strong passion for storytelling, filmmaking, and television production. I have experience with video editing, creative writing, screenwriting, theater arts, and working in fast-paced team environments. I’m reliable, hardworking, organized, and eager to learn from industry professionals.

✅ Valid driver’s license
✅ Willing to relocate anywhere for the right opportunity
✅ Flexible schedule
✅ Strong work ethic and positive attitude
✅ Passionate about film and television production

I’m looking to connect with filmmakers, production companies, crew members, and anyone who may know of PA openings, internships, or entry-level opportunities.

If you have any advice, leads, or opportunities, please feel free to comment or send me a message. Thank you for your time and support!

I DO LIVE IN PENNSYLVANIA BUT I AM WILLING TO MOVE!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! 

#FilmProductionAssistant #ProductionAssistant #FilmJobs #TVProduction #Filmmaking #FilmIndustry #ProductionCrew #EntryLevelFilmJobs #OpenToWork #FilmNetworking #AspiringFilmmaker 🎥✨

items.text:
San Fernando Valley Parking Lot Available for Filming / Basecamp

Looking to see if there’s any interest from production crews, location managers, or event organizers.

We have a large private parking lot available at 5650 Shoup Ave, Woodland Hills, CA 91367 in the west San Fernando Valley. The lot can accommodate 100+ vehicles and works well for:

* Film & TV basecamp
* Crew parking
* Production staging
* Equipment storage
* Commercial shoots
* Special events

Easy access, plenty of space, and flexible availability depending on the date.

For details, availability, or rates, text Sam at 818-300-3023.

items.text:
At Cherry Pips Acting, we specialise in TV & screen technique! 🎬

As well as self tape technique we also explore blocking movement for camera and shot types, for example a two shot or a tracking shot 🎥

We cultivate a space where young actors can explore, develop understanding and build confidence on camera! 💫

Want to know more about our classes & courses in Manchester or online?

📧 Send us an email today!

classes@mcaa.co.uk

#actingclass #cameratechniques #youngactors #screenacting

items.text:
**Call for young male actor for rehearsed reading, next Tue 16th June (evening) in Central London **

Hello! I'm Director of Liars' League London, where actors read short stories live in front of a literature-loving audience, looking to cast a young male reader for our event next Tuesday at The Phoenix, Cavendish Square. You must be free for one 45-60 min rehearsal over Zoom sometime prior, & a 20 minute read on the night. 

We'll buy you dinner or drinks (as preferred) as a thank you & your live reading will also be recorded in HD and uploaded to our YouTube channel, and included in our podcast. 

The story is about a father-son dive which turns deadly, and the narrator is 23 but you can be playing age up to mid-30s, as you will be reading a story rather than playing a stage role, so the fit doesn't have to be perfect. 

Please send your Spotlight link or CV with headshot to **liars@liarsleague.com** ASAP. Thanks!

(Photo: our actor Tim Larkfield reading at our Halloween event :)

#casting #shortfilm
ASAP

Casting 4 actors for a 16mm short film. Paid. 

One shooting day in LA, June 12th - 15th. More likely a few hours only.

Please, send a selfie in daylight, reel or video of you speaking/reading a monologue/ poem, resume if you have one.

A Friend( Supporting )

21-26y.o, woman. Naitive Russian  speaker, fluent English required with a minimal or near-native accent. Conventionally attractive. Maude Apatow type. Shoe size 7

Another girl (Supporting )

21-26y.o young black woman. Conventionally attractive. Standard American accent. Couple of lines. 

Quenlin Blackwell type.

Taxi driver (Supporting )

Looking for a Black woman in her 40s-50s with her own car. Real driver for Uber /Lyft preferred.Myra Lucretia Taylor type.

Evicted Women (Featured Background ) 

Background role.White women in her 40s-50s, blonde hair

items.text:
Hope Among The Cosmos Student Film Deadline Extension (June 10th, Wed)
CASTING CALL — Hope Among The Cosmos Short Film | Rockford, IL Area | Shooting September 2026 (19th, 20th, 26th, 27th), with a possible pick-up shot date in early October (TBA).

Hope Among The Cosmos is a post-apocalyptic sci-fi story about a father and daughter on a routine trading run that goes very wrong. It's got action, heart, and some genuinely dark moments. Think practical effects, real locations, and a story worth telling.

This is a student/indie production, unpaid, but you'll get credit, meals on shoot days, and footage of your work when it's ready.

XANDER — Male, 30s-40s
The father. Big presence, quiet intensity, he carries a lot of weight but doesn't talk about. Physical role, but the emotional stuff is what really matters. If you can be still and terrifying at the same time. Preferred: African-American, mixed race, or biracial, but if you feel like this person, reach out.

MINA — Female, 12-15
Xander's daughter and the soul of this film. She's not a sidekick. She's watching her dad's world for the first time and figuring out what she believes. I need someone who can actually listen on camera, not just act. Same ethnicity preference as Xander, African-American, mixed race, or biracial, but if you feel like this person, reach out.

YOUNG XANDER — Male, 8-11
A flashback version of Xander as a kid, alone in a ruined outpost, finding something he shouldn't. Barely any dialogue, this is all about what's on his face. Preferred: African-American, mixed race, or biracial. 

Email jordanm.hannah89@gmail.com

Subject: Hope Among the Cosmos Casting, [Your Name]
Send a photo, the role you're going for, your September availability, and a little about yourself. and request the sides, and they will be sent immediately.

BBR Indie Films is seeking dynamic, authentic female talent for an upcoming professional music video shoot. We are looking for women who can powerfully embody the following roles:
 
Skilled Trades & Labor:
Mechanics, Construction Workers, Welders, etc

Civil & Community Heroes: Firefighters, Judge, Police or Detective, Mail Carriers / Couriers

Athletes & Performers:
 Ballet Dancers, Tap, Hip Hop dancers 
 Sports Players (Track & Field, Softball, Basketball, etc.)

📋 COMPENSATION
 IMDb Credit Provided
 Meals Provided on Set

Location: Atlanta, GA

 ✉️ HOW TO APPLY
If you fit any of the descriptions above, please submit your application to:

📧 info@bbrmediagroup.com
Submission Requirements:
Please respond with a recent photograph, preferably showcasing you in your uniform, work gear, or athletic attire. SUBJECT:  Female Talent

Join us on set and help bring this vision to life!

Looking for Actors 🎬

I’m looking for people to collaborate on UGC (User Generated Content) videos, simple phone recordings done at home.

📍 Requirements:

• age: 25 to 65 

• comfortable in front of the camera

• very short videos (around 1 minute)

💰 Paid collaboration – £60 per video

🎯 Topic: promotion of a health & wellness product

If you’re interested, please send us (BreatheLio) a message with a short introduction and (if available) your portfolio or comment below.

items.text:
URGENT CASTING CALL - EDINBURGH ‼️‼️
Hello, we are currently looking for a male actor for our student short film with Edinburgh College. We are aiming for film from the 6-9th of May and so are looking for someone who will be available within those days. 

Age - 25-26 ( Casting age - 25-27 or just an older looking 23 and above year olds.)
Identity - Straight, white, man, Scottish.
Personality - Narcissist, passionate, hot headed,
"nice" guy, controlling, and abusive.
Character Synopsis - Dany is dating a girl who discovers that her blood glows. He then discovers that he is obsessed with looking at the blood, and continues to ask his girlfriend (Bevan) to give him more of her blood. Disappointed when she can no longer produce what he wants, he leaves her.

Story Synopsis: A young girl discovers that her blood glows while harming herself. Panicked and disturbed by this discovery, she shows her boyfriend. Who, instead of having care or concern for her, starts exploiting her for her blood as he is enticed by it.
Struggling to perform and produce consistently for him, she grapples with self hate and worth, loosing grip on her mental state. Eventually, when her blood isn’t satisfactory for him anymore, he leaves her feeling worthless after sucking her dry of her youth and innocence.

If you are interested or want to know more please email our director at: ec1958677@edinburghcollege.ac.uk

items.text:
🚨 THE SECRET SAUCE? I’M LAUNCHING IT TODAY. 🚨

For years, actors have asked me:

❓ How do I stay motivated?
❓ How do I find more opportunities?
❓ How do I keep moving forward when the industry feels impossible?
❓ How do I stop feeling like I’m doing this alone?

Today at 12pm Midday (UK) I’m going LIVE to reveal what I believe is the real secret sauce behind building a successful acting career…

And it’s the exact reason I’ve created the MZA Inner Circle.

A daily system of accountability, mindset, opportunities, coaching and support designed to help actors keep moving forward every single day.

No gimmicks.
No shortcuts.
Just a community and system designed to help you become the actor you’re capable of being.

📅 TODAY
⏰ 12pm Midday (UK)
📍 Instagram Live: @mattzinaacting

Whether you’re a current MZA member or you’ve only recently discovered us, make sure you’re there.

Diarise it. Set an alarm. Cancel whatever can wait. Just be there.

The actors who make progress aren’t necessarily the lucky ones.

They’re the ones who consistently show up.

See you at 12pm. 👊

#InnerCircle #ActorMindset #ActingCareer #ScreenActing #MattZinaActing #ActorsLife

items.text:
**Our LIVE Actor Q&A.**

**No script. No presentation. Just real questions from actors and honest answers from us, KC and Donna-Marie.**

In this class we answer questions about:

🎬 Why talented actors aren't always booking
🎬 The difference between talent and skill
🎬 What casting directors are really looking for
🎬 How to know if you're making the right choices
🎬 What may be holding your career back right now

If you've ever wondered:

"Am I good enough?"

"Why am I auditioning but not booking?"

"What should I be working on next?"

There's a good chance we've answered it here.

And if you're watching the replay...

**Leave your question in the YouTube comments.**

**We read them, and we'll answer them.**

Watch the replay and ask away. 👇

items.text:
Nie zwalniasz tempa, gdy dzień stawia wyzwania? Weź udział w castingu dla branży farmaceutycznej! 
 
ŻYJESZ AKTYWNIE ? SZUKAMY WŁAŚNIE CIEBIE !

Do najnowszej reklamy leku poszukujemy:

BOHATER 01 – CHŁOPAK, 23–28 lat (rola główna)
Naturalny, współczesny chłopak o sympatycznym i autentycznym wizerunku. Powinien wiarygodnie grać subtelne emocje – od lekkiego dyskomfortu po radość i ulgę. Ważna naturalna mimika i swoboda przed kamerą.

EPIZODYSTKA 01 – DZIEWCZYNA, 23–28 lat
Naturalna, atrakcyjna i pełna pozytywnej energii. Współczesny, wiarygodny wygląd. Ważna naturalność, sympatia oraz umiejętność budowania ciepłej, pozytywnej atmosfery przed kamerą.

BOHATERKA 02 – KOBIETA, 27–35 lat
Naturalna i autentyczna, swobodnie poruszająca się przed kamerą. Mile widziane doświadczenie taneczne, ale nie jest wymagane. Powinna potrafić pokazać lekkość, relaks i spontaniczną radość w naturalny sposób.

BOHATER 02 – MĘŻCZYZNA, 35–50 lat
Aktywny, regularnie trenujący sportowiec. Doświadczenie w kickboxingu, muay thai lub innych sportach walki będzie atutem. Ważna wiarygodność ruchowa, naturalna charyzma i pozytywna energia. Nie szukamy kulturysty ani modela fitness.

STAWKI:

Rola główna: od 4 000 zł !
Epizod: od 2 000 !

MATERIAŁY DO NAGRANIA:
WIZYTÓWKA + SCENKA

TIMING:

12.06 – zgłoszenia mailowe do godz. 19:00
17.06 – recall 
22.06 – przymiarki 
24.06 – zdjęcia w Warszawie

ZGŁOSZENIA:

Zgłoszenie mailowe zawierające imię i nazwisko, wiek, numer telefonu + zdjęcie + link do video wizytówki + nagranie scenki proszę przesłać na: casting@unagimedia.pl 

Tytuł: 071

Link do castingu + opis postaci + scenki:
https://unagimedia.pl/pl/casting071/

Podejmij wyzwanie i dołącz do castingu! Czekamy na Twoje zgłoszenie!

items.text:
After signing a consent form at a therapist’s office, a teenage girl begins forgetting parts of her life after every session. At the same time, a man receives the memories being taken from her through the therapist. As her memories fade and strange gaps begin appearing in her life, she slowly starts losing her sense of self.

The link to sign up for cast is: https://forms.gle/dCxGNpKtVW8cmfBh8

Filming is in Lower Hutt in early July.

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of text that says "CAST CALLOUTS If If you are interested in acting in a student led upcoming short film THIS IS YOUR SIGN You dont need experience to act as long as you have the passion. Fill out the form in the description any time before the 20 June 2026. If you have any questions or cant find the link, email: ajonesOlechilton.school.nz and smooar@chilton.school.nz. Please note that this is a student crew and not paid but food will be provided α insta: @asproductions2026 a + S productions"

items.text:
STAFFING IN CHARLESTON, SC!
Branded Promo Talent, a leading experiential marketing agency, is seeking reliable, enthusiastic, and professional Brand Ambassadors to represent TD Bank at Juneteenth on the Yard in Charleston, SC!

Date & Time:

Friday, June 19, 2026

8:30 AM - 5:00 PM

Location:

International African American Museum

14 Wharfside Street

Charleston, SC 29401

Compensation:

Team Lead - $35/per hour

BAs ‐ $30/per hour

—1099, paid weekly—

Attire:

Branded t-shirts will be provided. Black shorts or slacks (no jeans, must be length appropriate, no rips) and black comfortable gym shoes.

Event Details:

TD Bank is proud to sponsor Juneteenth on the Yard at the International African American Museum. Our event team will proudly represent TD Bank throughout the celebration while supporting a fun, welcoming, and community-focused experience that honors culture, connection, and inclusion.

Staff Duties:

• Create a fun, engaging, and positive atmosphere for all attendees.

• Help drive traffic to the activation through enthusiastic and professional interaction.

• Distribute branded giveaways and support games, activities, and guest experiences.

• Assist with overall event execution while helping maintain a clean and welcoming space.

• Proudly represent TD Bank’s commitment to diversity, inclusion, culture, and community.

Staff Expectations:

We want high-energy, outgoing, and engaging Brand Ambassadors who know how to hype a crowd and create great vibes. You must be punctual, professional, and ready to bring it from start to finish!

Application Process:

To be considered, email chrissy@brandedpromotalent.com with the following:

• Availability

• Resume

• Headshot

• Relevant experience

• A brief description of why you’re an excellent fit for this role.

Please use "Juneteenth on the Yard - Charleston, SC" as the subject of your email.

Note: Only applicants who follow all instructions will be considered. Our team will review qualifications via email and schedule a call with eligible candidates.

items.text:
Everyone thinks you need drama school, an agent, or years of training before you can call yourself an actor.

You don't.

In my latest video, I break down exactly how to get started as an actor with zero experience — no matter your age, no matter where you live, no matter where you're starting from.

This is the video I wish someone had handed me at the beginning. 🎬

👇 The link is in the comments.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'ARE YOU TOO OLD TO BECOME AN ACTOR?'

topComments.text: I picked up work at the age of 67 I am now 76 so for the last nine years I've been acting working as an actor and support artist not only did I not go to school I left school with zero degrees severe dyslexia yet my passion for acting just continued I've been in over 200 different Productions and I've never looked back

Agree! I was unexpectedly talent-scouted at the age of 50, went on to win Best Actor at an international film festival, and later received several other awards. I’ve also starred in lead roles in feature films, had multiple films go viral, and even walked the red carpet. 15 years later, I am still acting every month.

items.text:
Das neue Streaming Bundle für Unter uns Fans #unteruns #hbomax #rtl+ #rtlplus 

https://youtube.com/shorts/sRtW50ssRrA 

Mein Moment im Büroloft von „Unter uns“

Diese Woche durfte ich bei „Unter uns“ in den @mmcstudios Köln als Nebenrollendarsteller mit Text vor der Kamera stehen. Die Szene spielte im Büroloft zwischen Huber & Huber Bauvision und Goldberg Superior Cologne. Mehr darf ich nicht verraten.

@actpm Patrick Müller als Tobias Lassner

Patrick verkörpert seit 2006 Tobias Lassner, einen erfolgreichen Anwalt mit kühler Fassade und weichem Kern. Seine Verbindung zu Leo macht diese Figur besonders menschlich und erzählerisch stark im Ensemble.

@miriam_lahnstein Miriam Lahnstein als Patrizia Neumann-Goldberg

Miriam spielt Patrizia Neumann-Goldberg, eine selbstbewusste Unternehmerin mit Machtinstinkt, Charme und Konsequenz. Als Mutter von Stella verkörpert sie Kontrolle, Ehrgeiz und familiäre Spannung mit großer Präsenz vor der Kamera.

@harun.yildirim_official Harun Yildirim als Ferhat Gülek

Harun spielt Ferhat Gülek, Architekt, Vater von Baris und Esma sowie Noch-Ehemann von Dana. Seine Figur bringt Charme, Lebensfreude und emotionale Bewegung in die Serie und in die Schillerallee hinein.

Wertschätzung am Set

Besonders wertvoll war das ruhige, respektvolle Miteinander der UFA-Produktion. In den MMC Studios Köln spürt man Präzision, Vertrauen, Timing und Teamgeist hinter jeder Szene und jedem gemeinsamen Moment am Set.

Jetzt ansehen und dranbleiben

Wenn Ihr „Unter uns“ verfolgt, achtet gern auf diese Figuren. Die Serie läuft jeden Abend bei @rtl_de und ist auf @rtlplus streambar. Teil 2 findet Ihr im Kanal von @sandras.social.media.creation (Sandra Wötzel) zum Weiterlesen.

Christian Weiße aka @christian_weisse_digi_content

#UnterUns #RTL #RTLPlus #UFASerialDrama #MMCStudios

items.text:
THE BIGGEST MISTAKE WITH ACTING CLASSES YOU NEED TO KNOW
There’s a common problem in most acting training that no one really talks about.
And it’s what keeps a lot of actors STUCK for years, wasting time and money.

Most acting training focuses on FEEDBACK.

Feedback doesn’t make you a consistently better actor.

I was explaining this to an actor recently using a simple analogy.

If you’re trying to shoot a basketball into a hoop and you keep missing, it doesn’t help if someone just says “closer,” “more energy,” or “that wasn’t it.”

What you need is the TECHNIQUE behind how to consistently get the ball through the hoop.

Acting is no different.

Actors don’t become bookable from one-off feedback.

Actors become bookable when they’re trained in a skill set that enables them to be exactly what casting directors are looking for in every audition.

For context, I’ve been working as an actor for 18 years across film, television, and stage.

My credits include series regular roles in two Netflix productions, six feature films in lead roles, Jersey Boys directed by Clint Eastwood, and Wendy Darling in ABC’s Once Upon a Time.

I’ve taken what works in practice and developed a structured approach that builds CONFIDENCE, CONSISTENCY, and ultimately leads to booking work.

I’m curious. Is this something you’ve noticed too?

DM me “ACTING” if you’re putting in the work but not seeing consistent results, and want to understand the simple technique that gets you booked.

items.text:
WARSZAWA// CASTING 

Poszukujemy aktorów dubbingowych do niezależnej animacji, z wyjątkowym przesłaniem. 

Realizacja: jeden dzień pomiędzy 1 - 15 lipca 2026 r. w Warszawie. 

Poszukujemy głosów do ról:
* Chłopiec - 7-11 lat 
* Dziewczynka - 8 - 11 lat 
* Chłopiec - 8 - 12 lat 
* Mężczyzna - 65 - 80 lat 
* Kobieta - 65 - 80 lat 
* Kobieta - 25- 45 lat 
* Mężczyzna - 28-45 lat
* Mężczyzna - 40-55 lat (z dobrym akcentem niemieckim!)
* Mężczyźni - 27-45 lat (z dobrym akcentem niemieckim!)
* Mężczyzna - 35- 50 lat (z dobrym akcentem amerykańskim!)

Zgłoszenie powinno zawierać: 
* portfolio
* próbkę głosu 
* dostępność w lipcu (prosimy o wypisanie konkretnych dni) 

Zgłoszenia: 

Na maila: [aleksandragajdosz.produkcja@gmail.com](mailto:aleksandragajdosz.produkcja@gmail.com)

Tytuł: Animacja dubbing casting + nazwa roli (np. Mężczyzna 35-50 lat)

BARDZO proszę o przestrzeganie tytułowania maili. 

Zlecenie: płatne. 

Szczegóły projektu wyślemy wybranym osobom :)

items.text:
📣 POSZUKUJEMY STAND-INKI DO FILMU FABULARNEGO – WARSZAWA 13.06
Na plan filmu fabularnego poszukujemy dziewczyny do prób kamerowych (stand-inka).

📍 Miejsce: Warszawa

📅 Termin: Sobota, 13.06

⏰ Czas pracy: ok. 6 godzin

Wymagania:
* wiek 16–20 lat,
* wzrost ok. 170 cm,
* rozmiar ubrań S/M,
* średniej długości blond włosy.

💰 Stawka: 400 zł

📧 Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać na: ludzie@unagimedia.pl

✉️ W tytule wiadomości wpisz: STANDINKA

W treści zgłoszenia podaj:
* imię i nazwisko,
* numer telefonu,
* wiek,
* wzrost,
* rozmiar ubrań.

Dołącz: 
📸 zdjęcie twarzy w rozpuszczonych włosach,

📸 zdjęcie całej sylwetki.

Zapraszamy do zgłoszeń! 🎬✨

sharedPost.text:
Der Kino Mittwoch auf radioYpsilon 

MOVIETIME KW 24/2026

DER ERSTE KONTAKT? DOKU ÜBER EINEN KULTFILM SOWIE 2 UNTERSCHIEDLICHE INTERVIEWS

Was wäre, wenn du herausfinden würdest, dass wir nicht allein sind? Angenommen, jemand könnte dir das beweisen: Hättest du Angst? Kultregisseur Steven Spielberg gibt uns nicht nur eine Wortspende, sondern stellt auch gleich selbst seinen Film DISCLOSURE DAY vor.

AUSSER ATEM gehört zweifellos zu den großen Filmklassikern. Doch was ist die Geschichte dahinter? NOUVELLE VAGUE wirft einen Blick auf die Dreharbeiten von Jean-Luc Godards bahnbrechendem Krimidrama – mit viel Liebe zum Detail, zahlreichen Verweisen und Humor.

Ebba Sinzinger ist eine bekannte österreichische Regisseurin, Drehbuchautorin und Filmproduzentin, die in Wien lebt und arbeitet. Sie ist vor allem für ihre engagierten Dokumentarfilme  vielen ein Begriff. Hinsichtlich ihres neuesten Filmes DIE KUNST KOMPLIZEN konnten wir mit ihr ein Interview führen.

Herbert Krautwurm ist ein bekannter, zertifizierter Kellergassenführer und ein echtes „Original“ aus dem niederösterreichischen Pulkautal. Er engagiert sich leidenschaftlich für die Erhaltung, Renovierung und Belebung der traditionellen Weinkultur im Weinviertel.Wofür er bekannt ist, darüber sprach Moderatorin Sarah Fuchs mit diesem Unikat.

Abgerundet wird das einstündige Magazin mit Songs aus Filmen der letzten 80 Jahre.

Mittwoch 10.6.2026 von 18 bis 19h auf radioYpsilon 94.5 oder via Stream (http://mp3.radioypsilon.at:8000/)

sharedPost.text:
✨ Tag 1 von 5 – Stimmtraining ✨
Was für ein spannender Auftakt! 🎶
Heute haben wir uns als Gruppe kennengelernt und sind direkt tief in die faszinierende Welt der Stimme eingetaucht. 🗣️🔬

 Gemeinsam haben wir die Anatomie des Vokaltrakts erkundet und untersucht, wie unterschiedliche Stimmfarben und Stimmqualitäten entstehen. Außerdem haben wir uns mit den Schwingungsformen der Stimmlippen beschäftigt und die Brücke zwischen aktueller Forschung und praktischer Anwendung geschlagen. 📚🎤

Natürlich durfte auch das Singen nicht fehlen! 🎶 Jede*r Teilnehmende hatte zudem die Gelegenheit, an einem eigenen Stück zu arbeiten und individuelle Impulse für die weitere Entwicklung mitzunehmen. 🌱✨

Ich freue mich auf die kommenden Tage, auf viele spannende Erkenntnisse, inspirierende Gespräche und darauf, die Stimmen weiter wachsen und leuchten zu sehen. 🎵💫

#casting #shortfilm
ASAP

Casting 4 actors for a 16mm short film. Paid. 

One shooting day in LA, June 12th - 15th. More likely a few hours only.

Please, send a selfie in daylight, reel or video of you speaking/reading a monologue/ poem, resume if you have one.

A Friend( Supporting )

21-26y.o, woman. Naitive Russian  speaker, fluent English required with a minimal or near-native accent. Conventionally attractive. Maude Apatow type. Shoe size 7

Another girl (Supporting )

21-26y.o young black woman. Conventionally attractive. Standard American accent. Couple of lines. 

Quenlin Blackwell type.

Taxi driver (Supporting )

Looking for a Black woman in her 40s-50s with her own car. Real driver for Uber /Lyft preferred.Myra Lucretia Taylor type.

Evicted Women (Featured Background ) 

Background role.White women in her 40s-50s, blonde hair

items.text:
Ready to learn a new skill in a friendly, beginner-focused class? Think it’s too late to begin? - You’re WRONG and it’s going to feel AMAZING when you discover that for yourself! 🥰

.Move more 
.Meet new people (My students are ACE!)
.Start slow and watch yourself improve
.Builds confidence and busts stress!
.Improves mental health & brain function

First time? 

.£3 CLASS MONDAY!
.FREE class on a THURSDAY!

sharedPost.text:
Let’s talk about it guys… Zumba. 💃

It’s great. I know loads of wonderful Zumba instructors, and there are some fantastic classes across Liverpool — honestly, you’re spoilt for choice! (Feel free to ask if you’re looking and I’ll happily point you in the right direction.)

You’ll get a brilliant workout, feel-good energy and a proper endorphin rush. What’s not to love? ☺️

You’ll find all of that in my sessions too. But also something a little deeper — building real dance technique & musicality alongside your movement confidence. Developing your dance ability as an art form as well as a workout.

And “deeper” doesn’t mean “difficult”.

Yes, there’s a slightly steeper learning curve than most fitness-based dance classes, but that’s where the growth — and the reward — comes from. My classes are still FIRMLY beginner-friendly and designed to help people learn step by step in a supportive environment. (Just check my feedback! 🥰)

Whatever route you choose the important thing is getting out there, giving it a go and moving more! ❤️ 

#learntodance #dancecommunity #confidencethroughdance #learn #moveyourbody

items.text:
FEATURE FILM TABLE READ

Mythological • Science Fiction • Horror

Do you love epic storytelling, powerful characters, ancient mythology, and supernatural suspense?

Trilokam Entertainment is seeking talented actors and performers for an exclusive Zoom table read of an upcoming feature-length Mythological Science Fiction Horror film.

 Indian Actors Preferred  All experience levels welcome  Opportunity to explore unique and compelling characters  Network with fellow actors and creatives

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

 DATE June 21, 2026

 TIME 3:00 PM – 7:00 PM

 LOCATION Zoom (Link provided upon selection)

 FORMAT • Complete script read-through • Two full readings of the screenplay • Character exploration and discussion

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

 SEEKING ACTORS WHO CAN BRING TO LIFE: • Heroes and Heroines • Mythological Figures • Warriors and Sages • Villains and Supernatural Beings • Modern and Futuristic Characters

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

 INTERESTED?

Send your: • Name • Acting Experience (if any) • Headshot or Photo (optional) • Contact Information

TO:

trilokamentertainment@gmail.com

Subject Line: TABLE READ SUBMISSION

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

"Ancient Powers. Future Worlds. Unspeakable Horrors."

Presented by TRILOKAM ENTERTAINMENT

Spaces are limited. Submit today to reserve your opportunity to participate.

items.text:
Tancerki potrzebne do obłędnej ekipy Tancerze PL - najbliższe zlecenia 6, 13 czerwca 2026. Narazie szukamy osób dostępnych w czerwcu które już z nami tańczyły (!!!) - w tym wypadku dzwońcie do Sylwii: 602406111 . 

Inne Tancerki i Tancerze, którzy chcieliby dołączyć do grupy na stałe - wkrótce ogłosimy casting. Jeśli chcesz się zgłosić już teraz - zaobserwuj naszego instagrama i skomentuj ten post. Następnie wyślij zgłoszenie przez grupa@tamcerze.pl . 

Zlecenia są choreograficzne (Tancerki klubowe, gogo dancers, fordanserki - nie dadzą rady) - próby (na tę chwilę) wyłącznie w Warszawie. Opcjonalnie osoby z 3miasta i okolic.

Uwaga, wyłącznie osoby wszechstronne tanecznie z dobrymi podstawami tańca jazzowego lub klasycznego lub towarzyskiego. Tylko osoby z klasą, i eleganckim, naturalnym wyglądem (przesadnie usta, botox itp - to nie nasza estetyka) 

PS. Jeśli tańczysz tylko high heels, sambę, bachate… dowolną wąską specjalizację - a nie masz podstaw klasycznych - możesz spróbować, ale będzie ciężko dorównać do poziomu grupy. Zaobserwuj nas i poczekaj na casting

items.text:
⚽ PILNY CASTING DO SERIALU „FORWARD” ⚽

Szukamy aktorów i aktorek mieszkających w Warszawie lub okolicach do anglojęzycznego serialu sportowego „FORWARD”.

📍 Zdjęcia: Warszawa
📅 Okres zdjęciowy: 15–24 czerwca
🎬 8 dni zdjęciowych

Poszukujemy osób swobodnie mówiących po angielsku, gotowych przesłać krótkie self-introduction w języku angielskim oraz dostępnych w terminach wskazanych przy rolach.

Wśród ról znajdują się m.in.:
• fanki drużyny piłkarskiej,
• dziennikarz sportowy,
• piłkarze,
• lekarze,
• inwestor Mr. Jones.

Wszystkie role posiadają kwestie dialogowe w języku angielskim.

Jeśli jesteś zainteresowany/a udziałem w projekcie, wyślij proszę wiadomość prywatną wraz ze swoim zgłoszeniem.

Czekam na Wasze wiadomości!

Irina
Casting Director

items.text:
PROFIT SHARE
# **Audition notice: Underneath the Lintel**

Show dates: 20-24 October 2026

Show venue: Nottingham Arts Theatre (studio)

Audition date: 11 July 2026, 1-4 pm (you will not need to be present for the full time and will be assigned a timeslot).

Audition venue: Lace Market Theatre, Nottingham

Karuna Productions invites auditionees for *Underneath the Lintel,* a one-woman show about obsession, loneliness and the search for belonging. When a middle-aged librarian uncovers evidence that a mythical figure dating back to mediaeval times may actually exist, she embarks on an improbable, absurd quest. It will take her across the world and face to face with life’s biggest questions – and finally to a small theatre in Nottingham to share her story…
# Parts

**The Librarian **(F, 40s-50s). Dutch (accent negotiable. Support will be available as needed on pronunciation of a few Dutch words – the director is a Dutch speaker). Eccentric, single-minded, a loner, somewhat scatty. She may initially appear ordinary, even forgettable, but a great deal lurks beneath. Requires a skilled actor with excellent comic instincts, who can command an audience’s attention while convincing as someone with limited social skills and an acute interest in minutiae.

# **About the production**

The run time of the show is about 1 hour. Rehearsals will take place in Nottingham, scheduled according to the availability of actor and director. This is a profit-share production.

# **About the company**

Karuna Productions is a new theatre company based in Nottingham.

**Director: **Chris Sims. Chris is a Nottingham-based director and graduate of the Bristol Old Vic Theatre School. Examples of his work can be found at [www.chrissimsdirecting.co.uk](https://www.chrissimsdirecting.co.uk/).

**Producer:** Laurie Owen. Laurie is a Nottingham-based independent producer who works across theatre and comedy.

For more information or to register for an audition slot, please email Chris on [kitsims@gmail.com](mailto:kitsims@gmail.com)

items.text:
**CASTING CALL! **We are looking for leading cast roles in commutable distance to Portsmouth for our annual pantomime - this year is Pinocchio! Produced in-house and performed alongside a cast of local child actors, this year's production aims to be the most fun and accessible panto in Portsmouth! 

 

**Details of roles, dates and auditions: **[https://www.groundlings.co.uk/pinocchio-casting](https://www.groundlings.co.uk/pinocchio-casting)

 

We're a community led theatre and as such cast members will be expected to work alongside young people, children and our volunteers - and look to have fun in the process!

 

For consideration, please submit a self tape including requested audition scenes and songs on the link above, indicating the specific role you’re applying for by 18 June 2026 to casting@groundlings.co.uk

Hejka!🦋
Poszukujemy standinki do realizacji nowego filmu fabularnego. Nie musisz mieć doświadczenia, są to próby kamerowe ☺️ Z A P R A S Z A M Y !🌺

💜Termin: 13 czerwca 2026 r. (sobota) 
🌴Lokalizacja: Warszawa 
🙌Stawka: 400 zł

Czas realizacji: maks do 7 godzin 

Wymagania: 
• wiek 16–18 lat 
• uroda słowiańska 
• blond włosy 
• ciemna oprawa oczu 
• wzrost 165/170 cm 
• rozmiar ubrań S/M 

Informacje dodatkowe: • wizerunek oraz głos nie będą wykorzystywane w filmie • doświadczenie nie jest wymagane 

💌Zgłoszenia przyjmujemy mailowo: 
ludzie@unagimedia.pl 

W tytule wiadomości wpisz: STANDINKA 

W treści maila prosimy o podanie: imienia i nazwiska, wieku, wzrostu, aktualnego zdjęcia portretowego, aktualnego zdjęcia sylwetki, numeru kontaktowego!

Do zobaczenia!👋 💫

items.text:
PAID SPOKESPERSON CASTING – VANCOUVER

We're casting an on-camera spokesperson for a series of professional educational videos in the financial services industry.

We're looking for someone who feels natural, relatable, trustworthy, and authentic on camera. The ideal candidate should have a warm presence and be comfortable delivering scripted content in a conversational, approachable way.

Project Details

Presenter / spokesperson role

Speaking role

4-hour shoot

Compensation: $500

Filming in the Vancouver area

Videos will be used across website, marketing, sales, onboarding, and educational materials

What We're Looking For

Male or female

Approximately 35–55 years old

Strong communication skills

Comfortable speaking directly to camera

Natural, everyday appearance preferred over a traditional commercial/model look

Previous on-camera experience is an asset but not required

To Apply

Please send:

Recent headshot or photos

A short self-tape (30–60 seconds) introducing yourself and delivering a few lines to camera

Send submissions to: colin@your-story.agency

Due to the volume of submissions, we will only be able to contact selected applicants. We sincerely appreciate everyone's interest and keep submissions on file for future opportunities.

topComments.text:
Hi Colin
What is the deadline to submit the audition tape?
Hi, that’s totally me. I will get on it right away.🙏

items.text:
**CASTING CALL — PAID — Older Male Actor for Short Film — Katy/Houston**

Hi everyone, I’m casting an older male actor for a paid short proof-of-concept film shooting in the Katy/Houston area.

We’re especially looking for someone with a grandfatherly presence, strong emotional range, and ideally some theatre experience.

**Project**: Short proof-of-concept film

**Shoot Date**: Friday, June 19 (night shoot)

**Location**: Katy / Houston area

**Compensation**: Paid

**Genre/Tone**: Dramatic, character-driven

The film centers on a charged meeting between a young man and an eccentric older poet inside a dark, atmospheric study.

**CASTING: EDMUND**

Looking for an older male actor, playing age roughly **60–80**.

Edmund is a warm, eccentric, theatrical older poet — grandfatherly, charming, funny. He can be childlike and playful in one moment, then suddenly shift into accusation, wounded anger, and passionate intensity.

This is a very performance-driven role with a lot of emotional shifts — from humor and playfulness to volatility and anger, and finally vulnerability. The role can be theatrical, but it should still feel human and truthful, not exaggerated or cartoonish.

This is a dialogue-heavy role and would be ideal for an actor with theatre experience, strong presence, and emotional depth.

**British accent required.**

Theatrical/classical background is a plus.

More information on the role and project: [https://www.junipervalleyfilm.com/edmund-ashford](https://www.junipervalleyfilm.com/edmund-ashford)

**TO APPLY**

Email preferred: [your email]

Subject line: EDMUND— [Your Name]

Please include:

Name

Role/position you’re applying for

Location

Relevant experience

Actor headshot/reel/resume, or crew reel/website/credits

Availability on June 19

DMs are also okay, and referrals are very welcome — especially for older actors with theatre experience.

Project website for more context: junipervalleyfilm.com

Thank you!
items.previewDescription: A role of theatrical force and hidden grief. Playful, volatile, tender, and wounded, Malcolm is a man whose theatricality hides a genuine ache. “The Temple of Peace” Malcolm’s study is the outward expression of his inner life. It is within this room that the film’s central confrontation unfo...

🎬 CASTING CALL – FEMALE SUPPORTING LEAD ROLE (NON-UNION, PAID) 🎬

Independent comedy short film is seeking a Latina actress or an actress who can portray a Latin woman for the role of Sofia filming in Miami, FL.

ROLE: SOFIA
Female, 40s or older preferred. Confident, lively, flirtatious, and larger than life. Sofia has a strong screen presence with expressive reactions and natural comedic instincts. The role contains minor dialogue but strong comedic visual scenes and physical comedy throughout.

Must be comfortable wearing high heels and appearing significantly taller than the male lead (5’5”). Preferred if actress is 5’7” or taller.

⸻

Production Details:
📍 Location: Miami, Florida
📅 Shoot Date: June, Exact date TBD
💰 Compensation: Paid

⸻

Requirements:
• NON-UNION ONLY (Must not be SAG-AFTRA)
• Strong comedic timing, facial expressions, and physical comedy skills
• Confident, charismatic on-camera presence
• Salsa or basic dance ability is a plus 
• Must be local or able to self-report
• Reel and/or video sample REQUIRED

⸻

Submission Instructions:
Please send headshot, reel and/or video sample, and current location to:
📩 elaine@elainefilms.com

Subject Line: Sofia Submission

Serious and available talent only.

items.text:
Where Will Your Acting Career Be a Year From Now If You Keep Doing What You’re Doing?
You trained. You got the headshots. Maybe you even got the agent.

And yet you’re wondering how you’re supposed to become a working actor when things aren’t progressing?

I am Freya Tingley. I was 14 when I started. No connections, no Hollywood map. By 17 I had signed with one of the biggest agents in town. At 18 I moved to LA and three months later I was a series regular on a Netflix show. Then Jersey Boys with Clint Eastwood. Then Wendy Darling on ABC’s Once Upon a Time.

It looks like luck from the outside. It wasn’t.

What you are not being told is that the actors who book have figured out the strategy. The ones who do not are still hoping for their lucky break.

I have been getting a lot of messages from actors lately saying:
“I have an agent but no auditions.”
“I am auditioning but not booking.”
“I do not know what I am doing wrong.”

All you need is the strategy. 

I run private 2-hour 1:1 mentorships over Zoom. We diagnose where you’re stuck, build a custom plan, and you leave knowing exactly what to do next - with the exact strategy to move you forward. 

If you know something needs to change, direct message me “COMMIT” to apply for a session. I have just a handful 

What would it cost you to change nothing?

At Cherry Pips Acting, we specialise in TV & screen technique! 🎬

As well as self tape technique we also explore blocking movement for camera and shot types, for example a two shot or a tracking shot 🎥

We cultivate a space where young actors can explore, develop understanding and build confidence on camera! 💫

Want to know more about our classes & courses in Manchester or online?

📧 Send us an email today!

classes@mcaa.co.uk

***** CALLING ALL LONDON ACTORS *****

Cast LDN are looking for the following actors for an exciting event sizzle.

**Date: **15th & 16th June 2026

**Location: **London

**Time required: **half a days filming 

**Age: **18+

**Payment: **£200 for smaller part, £250 for the two male cab drivers 

The roles we are looking for are:
* **Male Cab Driver **- London accent, 50s/60s, mixed ethnicities 
* **Female Cab Driver** - 40s, driving licence required 
* **Hair Stylist **- 20s, male, LGBTQIA+, black
* **Hair Client **- 60s/70s, female, black
* **School Girls **- 18+, mixed ethnicities 
* **Turkish Shop Employee** - 20s, male, Turkish
* **LGBTQIA+ Teens on Bikes** - Late teens, mixed ethnicities, mixed gender expression 
* **Women waiting on the street** - 50s, British-Indian
* **Uncle Tony** - 70s, male, East Londoner
* **Young Man** - 20s, white, sportswear
* **Football Extras** - 20s, mixed ethnicities 
* **David Attenborough** - 60+, a David Attenborough lookalike from behind, must be able to dribble a football 

If this sounds like something you’d be interested in, we’d love to hear from you. Please send us the following to hello@castldn.com :
* Full name
* Location 
* Your contact details 
* What role you would like to apply for 
* Any previous work/ videos

Thanks so much! 

Cast LDN

items.groupTitle: Casting Calls & Acting Auditions in London / UK
items.summary:
***** CALLING ALL LONDON ACTORS *****

Cast LDN are looking for the following actors for an exciting event sizzle.

**Date: **15th & 16th June 2026

**Location: **London

**Time required: **half a days filming 

**Age: **18+

**Payment: **£200 for smaller part, £250 for the two male cab drivers 

The roles we are looking for are:
* **Male Cab Driver **- London accent, 50s/60s, mixed ethnicities 
* **Female Cab Driver** - 40s, driving licence required 
* **Hair Stylist **- 20s, male, LGBTQIA+, black
* **Hair Client **- 60s/70s, female, black
* **School Girls **- 18+, mixed ethnicities 
* **Turkish Shop Employee** - 20s, male, Turkish
* **LGBTQIA+ Teens on Bikes** - Late teens, mixed ethnicities, mixed gender expression 
* **Women waiting on the street** - 50s, British-Indian
* **Uncle Tony** - 70s, male, East Londoner
* **Young Man** - 20s, white, sportswear
* **Football Extras** - 20s, mixed ethnicities 
* **David Attenborough** - 60+, a David Attenborough lookalike from behind, must be able to dribble a football 

If this sounds like something you’d be interested in, we’d love to hear from you. Please send us the following to hello@castldn.com :
* Full name
* Location 
* Your contact details 
* What role you would like to apply for 
* Any previous work/ videos

Thanks so much! 

Cast LDN

Tales From The Hollywood Voice Over Vault features unforgettable stories, rare behind-the-scenes moments, celebrity encounters, studio adventures, and lessons learned from decades in the entertainment industry. New episodes drop every week, taking you inside the world of voice over like never before! #voiceover #Hollywood #BehindTheScenesa ##HollywoodStories #voiceactor #marcgraue #legendary #voiceovercoach #studiostories #voice

items.text:
🎟 Looking for one of the best things to do in Spokane on Saturday, June 13th? 🎟 Use this special code **DDSWA** 

www.thedinnerdetective.com/spokane

The Dinner Detective combines dinner, comedy, mystery, and audience participation into one unforgettable evening. The actors are hidden throughout the crowd, making every guest part of the experience.

Perfect for couples, friend groups, celebrations, and team outings.

Reserve your seats and see if you can solve the mystery.

🌐 Book Now: https://www.thedinnerdetective.com/spokane
🎟️ Use Code to save on June 13th: DDSWA
🚨 Spokane's most wanted event is back!

If you're searching for something beyond the typical dinner date, The Dinner Detective delivers an unforgettable night of mystery, comedy, and audience interaction.

You'll share dinner with suspects.

The question is...Can YOU catch the culprit?

Grab your partner, friends, coworkers, or family and experience why guests keep coming back for more.

🎟 Looking for one of the best things to do in Spokane on Saturday, June 13th? 🎟 Use this special code **DDSWA** 

www.thedinnerdetective.com/spokane

The Dinner Detective combines dinner, comedy, mystery, and audience participation into one unforgettable evening. The actors are hidden throughout the crowd, making every guest part of the experience.

Perfect for couples, friend groups, celebrations, and team outings.

Reserve your seats and see if you can solve the mystery.

items.text:
The workouts are challenging. The music is incredible. And apparently, Jonathan Bailey is my emotional support system. 😂

Tonight I’m streaming Six on ZOOM, and it’s going to be a good one.

🎭 First class is free. Just DM me, and I’ll send you a free link. It’s super chill. I’m just trying to get this thing off the ground.

sharedPost.text:
POV: You know you should be training this summer… but working out alone is boring.

That’s why I teach Zoom classes.

The workouts are challenging. The music is incredible. And apparently, Jonathan Bailey is my emotional support system. 😂

Tonight we’re streaming Six, and it’s going to be a good one.

🎭 First class is free with code ZOOMSTAR.

#SweatingToShowTunes #MoreThanTalent #TheatreFitness #BroadwayWorkout #SixTheMusical JonathanBailey

items.text:
Seeking talent for AFP as Town Criers - VA/DC/Philadelphia - NU - June & July 2026

We are casting for an upcoming social blitz with **[Americans for Prosperity (AFP).](https://americansforprosperity.org/)** 

**Scope: **As part of the upcoming America 250 celebrations, AFP is creating a social campaign featuring **1776-style Town Criers**, standing up and reading passages from the Declaration of Independence in public places around the country. This is an homage to how the news of the Declaration spread throughout the country almost 250 years ago. 

These organic *"street performances" *will be captured "*Tik-Tok style"* in public places across the country.

The goal is to gain some virality and media attention culminating in a feature on "Fox and Friends" in NYC with at least one (or potentially all) the Town Criers - along with a few VIPs from the AFP orbit. But this portion is unconfirmed and TBC. 

We are seeking **4 talent** (21+, open ethnicity, registered/voted Republican voters, local to Virginia, DC and/or Philadelphia) to work with us as **Town Criers. **We are seeking talent that has experience with stage performance, street performance and improvisational comedy. Additionally, we are seeking individuals comfortable wearing an elaborate Town Crier costume for extended periods (reference images attached), performing outside, and familiarizing themselves with and live-reading the Declaration of Independence using a projected voice. We are looking for people who can "commit to the bit" have fun, and make this their own. 

**Rate: **$1000/shoot day, $500/travel day (less any fees)

**Usage**: No paid push - all organic social. 

**Dates:** Shooting window is June 22-July 4. We would need to source talent availability for that whole window to accurately book and assign activations. 

**Locations:** Philadelphia, Virginia (TBD), DC.

**Logistics: **Production will cover travel costs and accommodations to the assigned studio zone/activation. Each hired talent is guaranteed one shoot day assignment in an aforementioned studio zone. An additional shoot day in D.C. may be required, coinciding with the Great American State Fair and pending the "Fox & Friends" activation in NYC. 

**Auditions:** We are seeking headshots, availability for June 22-July 4, and current home bases. We could potentially solicit reads in subsequent rounds, but for now we are just looking for a matrix of availability, voter status and location. 

**SUBMISSION PROCESS:** Submit your industry standard actors headshot with file labeled with your first and last name, along with your home base/location, and voter status (ie whether you are registered Republicans or have previously voted Republican) to [bias@liquidtalentgroup.com](mailto:bias@liquidtalentgroup.com) no later than 10 am on June 12.  By submitting, you are confirming that you are available during the shoot timeframe window and meet the specifications described in this casting.

items.text:
We are currently finalising casting for our production of Aladdin at The Corn Hall in Diss, Norfolk, this Christmas and are seeking an actor for the title role of Aladdin.

We wondered whether you may have any male-presenting clients on your books who would be interested in being considered for the role.

If you have any suitable clients, please send a headshot, showreel, and CV to ryan@sparklive.co.uk
items.title:
STAY TUNE GUYS….!

Rahat Shah,
A talented Fitness Model/Actor/Photographer and British Champion in Men’s Physique from Birmingham, UK! 

Hailing from a renowned art family in Pakistan’s film industry, Rahat’s creative genes are undeniable. With a string of achievements, including winning the British Champion award and Asians Beauty Pageant, Rahat has made a name for himself.

His upcoming Indian thriller film “Second Chance” Directed by Sachin Karande is set to release soon, promising to captivate audiences worldwide.

As a cover model for numerous magazines, Rahat’s charm and physique have won hearts. Through his journey, he aims to inspire others, proving that hard work and dedication can lead to success. Stay tuned for an exciting story of passion, talent, and triumph!

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'Aladdin CASTING CALL We are now casting for our pantomime production of 'Aladdin'. SHOW Aladdin- Aladdin Pantomime REHEARSAL DATES 6th 13th December 2026 PERFORMANCE DATES 15th Dec 2026- 3rd Jan 2027 LOCATION The Corn Hall, Diss, Norfolk WE ARE CURRENTLY ONLY CASTING FOR THE FOLLOWING ROLE: ALADDIN A male Identifying actor, with strong vocal and good dance ability. Ideally will have had previous pantomime experience. We encourage applications from performers of all ethnicities and backgrounds. INTERESTED? Email your CV with showreel to ryan@sparklive.co.uk'
