items.summary:
We are currently finalising casting for our production of Aladdin at The Corn Hall in Diss, Norfolk, this Christmas and are seeking an actor for the title role of Aladdin.

We wondered whether you may have any male-presenting clients on your books who would be interested in being considered for the role.

If you have any suitable clients, please send a headshot, showreel, and CV to ryan@sparklive.co.uk

items.text:
CASTING CALL – 📍London, UK.
MA FILMMAKING STUDENT SHORT FILMS

University of East London 

We are MA Filmmaking students currently casting for two upcoming short films (12–15 minutes duration) to be filmed for our major creative project.

FILM 1: GUTTER (Hindi Language)

Logline: 

With his visa expiring, an aspiring Bollywood actor faces a cruel choice: go home and pursue his dream, or remain illegally in London and sacrifice it to save his family from the gutters. 

Santhosh (Lead) Male

- Age: 20–25

- Indian

- Brown complexion

- Slim or toned physique

- Hindi speaker

Safeena (Lead) Female

- Age: 20–25

- Indian

- Brown complexion

- Slim build

- Hindi speaker

Kailash Uncle (Supporting Role)

- Age: 35–50

-  Hindi speaker

Ruben (Supporting Role)

- Age: 30–40

- Hindi speaker

Sister of Santhosh (Supporting Role)

- Age: 30–40

- Brown complexion

- Hindi speaker

FILM 2: I Think I Love You (English Language)

Logline: 

A young filmmaker who has spent her life trying to be perfect begins to confront her fear of failure through three versions of herself, and after a public breakdown, she learns to make her first film honestly and accept who she really is.

Maddie (Lead)

- Age: 22–30

- Sri Lankan, Indian, Pakistani, Middle Eastern, or similar background

- Brown or dark complexion

- Chubby build preferred

The Unnamed Woman (Lead)

- Age: 22–30

- Sri Lankan, Indian, Pakistani, Middle Eastern, or similar background

- Brown or dark complexion

- Well-groomed appearance

Adrian (Supporting Role – Professor)

- Age: 35–55

- European, American, Australian, or African background

- White, fair, or Black ethnicity

- Native or fluent English speaker

HOW TO APPLY

Please send the following:

- Headshots

- Portrait photographs

- Showreel (if available)

- A brief introduction

- The role(s) you would like to be considered for

Send applications to (both):

📧 m4dhu.s.111@gmail.com

📧 neelchampaneri09@gmail.com

Neel Champaneri 

Subject Line: Casting Application – [Role Name]

We welcome applications from both experienced and emerging actors.

Thank you, and we look forward to seeing your submissions!
items.title:
STAY TUNE GUYS….!

Rahat Shah,
A talented Fitness Model/Actor/Photographer and British Champion in Men’s Physique from Birmingham, UK! 

Hailing from a renowned art family in Pakistan’s film industry, Rahat’s creative genes are undeniable. With a string of achievements, including winning the British Champion award and Asians Beauty Pageant, Rahat has made a name for himself.

His upcoming Indian thriller film “Second Chance” Directed by Sachin Karande is set to release soon, promising to captivate audiences worldwide.

As a cover model for numerous magazines, Rahat’s charm and physique have won hearts. Through his journey, he aims to inspire others, proving that hard work and dedication can lead to success. Stay tuned for an exciting story of passion, talent, and triumph!

currently casting for an upcoming music video taking we are looking for:

📍 Location: Los Angeles / Boyle Heights  
💰 Compensation: $150 + lunch provided  
⏰ Approx. 6-hour shoot day  
🎥 Professional music video production

* Well-built / fit physique
* Must own a suit and be able to bring it to set

4380 S Syracuse St Suite 400, Denver, CO 80237

No fancy Hollywood nonsense.

Just good people makin' movies.

🌐 https://movieteam.site/

The tide waits for no pirate.

items.text:
BUILDING STAY LIVE

Design the Film • Play Along • Win Prizes

Ever wondered what it takes to turn a novel into a film?

Join us for a fun, interactive evening as we pull back the curtain on the STAY proof of concept and invite you into the filmmaking process.

Throughout the event, you'll help us make creative decisions, play along in live games, compete for prizes, and get an inside look at how we're bringing STAY from page to screen.

During the event we'll:

 Explore characters, locations, and visual ideas from the STAY universe

 Help design the world of STAY through live audience polls and discussions

 Learn what goes into creating a proof of concept and why we're making one

 Play "Guess the Budget" and see if you can correctly estimate real filmmaking costs

 Compete in fun character-based games and cast challenges

 Win STAY-themed prizes and exclusive digital goodies

 Learn how your support helps bring this story to life

Whether you've read the books, attended previous events, or are discovering STAY for the very first time, this event is designed to be interactive, entertaining, and welcoming to everyone.

Come play along, meet the team, and help us build the future of STAY.

 Date & Time:

June 8, 2026 @ 3pm PST, 4pm MST, 5pm CST, 6pm EST

 Platform:

Riverside

items.summary:
BUILDING STAY LIVE

Design the Film • Play Along • Win Prizes

Ever wondered what it takes to turn a novel into a film?

Join us for a fun, interactive evening as we pull back the curtain on the STAY proof of concept and invite you into the filmmaking process.

Throughout the event, you'll help us make creative decisions, play along in live games, compete for prizes, and get an inside look at how we're bringing STAY from page to screen.

During the event we'll:

 Explore characters, locations, and visual ideas from the STAY universe

 Help design the world of STAY through live audience polls and discussions

 Learn what goes into creating a proof of concept and why we're making one

 Play "Guess the Budget" and see if you can correctly estimate real filmmaking costs

 Compete in fun character-based games and cast challenges

 Win STAY-themed prizes and exclusive digital goodies

 Learn how your support helps bring this story to life

Whether you've read the books, attended previous events, or are discovering STAY for the very first time, this event is designed to be interactive, entertaining, and welcoming to everyone.

Come play along, meet the team, and help us build the future of STAY.

 Date & Time:

June 8, 2026 @ 3pm PST, 4pm MST, 5pm CST, 6pm EST

 Platform:

Riverside

[https://riverside.com/studio/landons-studio-ikGYl](https://riverside.com/studio/landons-studio-ikGYl?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExS0d0OE5nZnF5TWVnbmhtQ3NydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR44MxgWb1RLT3_qROaFO1BN_IdZFHqvF_4MH7cEmbEPLXvGoNQdRb5wzT8BFA_aem_vzQT1Q-jEiMSrBOcmfWERw)...

Für unseren Low-Budget Kinofilm „Unter Erfolg“ (AT) sind wir derzeit auf der Suche nach Komparsen aus Berlin und Umgebung. 

Drehzeitraum: 13.07. - 21.08.2026

Alter: 18 bis 55 Jahre

Geschlecht: w/m/d

Wohnort: Berlin und Umgebung

Gage: unbezahlt

Wichtig: Du musst nicht in dem gesamten Drehzeitraum verfügbar sein. Wir planen dich nach deiner Verfügbarkeit ein.

LOGLINE: Zwischen einem dominanten Trainer, der ihn zu formen versucht, und einer jungen Frau, die ihm eine andere Welt zeigt, steht ein junger Tischtennisspieler vor der Entscheidung: weiter funktionieren - oder endlich fühlen.

Meld dich gerne mit deinen Sperrterminen und einem Portrait bei untererfolg@gmail.com mit dem Betreff „Komparsen“.

Wir freuen uns auf dich!

items.text:
GRAVE STAKES — OPEN CASTING CALL

Hey everyone! My name is Paul Dächert, I’m a Bachelor directing student at SAE Institute Munich, and I’m currently casting for my thesis film — and I’d love for you to be part of it.

THE FILM

Grave Stakes is a stylized Western dramedy set in a surreal frontier world where death is not an end, but a negotiation. A dying man embarks on a final journey back to his hometown with one goal: to take control over how his life ends. Along the way, a reluctant Death-in-training, a cynical grave digger, and a sharp-witted outlaw woman join him on a road that blends dark humor with existential depth.

Can we truly control how our story ends — or is that the one thing we must learn to let go?

📍 Munich, Germany · 🎬 Sep 10–13, 2026 · 🗣 Filmed in English
💰 No budget · Full catering on set · Showreel footage · Festival submission

THE ROLES

We are currently casting the following five roles:

🤠 Will O’Die — Lead
Male · 30–50 · Black / Afro-descendant
A man at the edge of his life. Dry-witted, quietly stubborn, and carrying both dark humor and real emotional weight. His journey isn’t about survival — it’s about authorship.

🌵 Gloria Sorrow — Lead
Woman · 22–32 · All backgrounds welcome
The sharpest person in every room. Self-possessed, funny, with real warmth underneath the armor. The film never comments on her being a woman. By the end, she’s Sheriff.

💀 Ashford Reaper — Supporting Lead
Open · 25–45 · All backgrounds welcome · ⚠️ British accent essential
Death. In training. Charming, earnest, and reliably incompetent in the most endearing way. The most human character in the film — and the funniest.

🃏 Quinn Alistor — Supporting
Open · 35–55 · All backgrounds welcome
A loveable rogue who would pickpocket Death himself. Runs on charm and self-interest — mostly. Somewhere underneath is one genuine act of kindness that matters more than he’d ever admit.

✝️ The Priest — Supporting
Open · 40–65 · All backgrounds welcome
Rides in unannounced, finds a practice funeral in progress, and steps up to officiate without missing a beat. One scene. One speech. The whole film hinges on it.

HOW TO APPLY

📅 Deadline: July 10, 2026
📩 dachertpaul@gmail.com

Please send:
→ A ~1 minute video in English: your name, age, location, and why a specific role speaks to you
→ A headshot
→ CV & showreel welcome, but not required

Fluent English required. Native speaker preferred — but what matters most is that you feel at home in the language.

We are committed to inclusive casting and warmly encourage actors from all backgrounds to apply. All experience levels welcome. Presence and truth over credits. ❤️

#GraveStakes #CastingCall #ShortFilm #StudentFilm #SAEMunich #OpenCall #CastingGermany #ActorsOfInstagram #WesternFilm #FilmMunich

sharedPost.text:
Hey Leute, für unser aktuelles Low Budget, Fantasy, Horror Filmprojekt suchen wir noch Darsteller für die Drehtage 08.06.26 und 09.06.26, gedreht wird nähe Grafenau im Bayerischen Wald. Wir brauchen noch Darsteller/innen, Komparsen, die Bewohner eines Bauerndorfes und schwarze Ritter spielen, die dieses Dorf überfallen und belagern. Ebenfalls werden noch zwei schwarze Ritter gesucht, mit Text (mit Dialog). Bewerbung mit 2-3 aktuellen Bildern von euch, sowie Körpergröße, Kleidergröße, Schuhgröße (für die Rollen mit Dialog ist ein Vorstellungsvideo erforderlich) bitte an Harlekin-filme@web.de oder direkt hier über Messenger an Harlekin Filme 

Liebe Grüße, euer Harlekin Filme Team
